reviews.comment:
Un desastre, en plena temporada y fin de semana atiende con un solo playero día y noche....ellos hacen lo que pueden pero es i suficiente ......

(Translated by Google)
A disaster. In the middle of peak season and on the weekend, they only have one attendant working day and night... they do what they can, but it's not enough...
